objectiveEn: About one hour. Learn 20 graduation words, free conversation using all A1 skills, listening, speaking, homework.
objectiveMn: Ойролцоогоор 1 цаг. 20 шинэ үг, бүх A1 чадварыг ашиглан чөлөөт яриа, сонсох, ярих, гэрийн даалгавар.
contentEn: Celebrate completing A1 by combining every grammar topic and skill in free conversation.
contentMn: A1 түвшинг дуусгасан баяраар бүх дүрэм, чадвараа чөлөөт яриандаа нэгтгэн ашиглана.

vocabulary.example: I am so proud of you!
You are ready for the next level.

quiz.question: I _____ English every day.
quiz.explanation: Present Simple for daily habits with 'I' uses base verb.

quiz.question: Yesterday I _____ to school.
quiz.explanation: Past Simple irregular form of 'go' is 'went'.

quiz.question: I _____ swim — I learned this month!
I _____ going to study Book 2.
quiz.explanation: Future plan with 'I' uses 'am going to + base verb'.

quiz.question: How does Bat feel on graduation day?
What did Bat enjoy most?
quiz.explanation: Bat says he loved the listening scripts and role play dialogues.

quiz.question: What is Sarnai going to do next?
quiz.explanation: Sarnai says she is going to start Book 2 immediately.

quiz.question: What is the most important lesson from 30 days?
quiz.explanation: Consistent daily practice is the key takeaway.

page1.grammarExplanation: Congratulations — you completed A1! In 30 days you learned: 600 new words · To Be · Present Simple · Present Continuous · Can/Can't · There is/are · Possessive adjectives · Prepositions · Object pronouns · Past Simple · Going to · Would like to · Imperatives · Plurals · Wh- questions. You can now introduce yourself, describe people and places, talk about the past, and plan for the future. You ARE A1 level English! · Баяр хүргэе! Та A1 дуусгасан! 30 хоногт та БҮХ дүрмийг сурсан. Та одоо өөрийгөө танилцуулж, өнгөрсөн болон ирээдүйн тухай ярьж чаддаг. Та ЖИНХЭНЭ A1!

grammarTable.subject: Days 7/26 — Can / Going to
grammarTable.positive: I can swim! I am going to study.
grammarTable.question: Can you swim? Are you going to study?

quickPractice: 1. My name _____ Bat. I _____ from Mongolia.
4. She _____ a teacher. She _____ very kind.
7. I _____ swim — I learned this month!
commonMistakes: You made mistakes — that means you LEARNED!
Every mistake was a step forward.
You kept going even when it was hard.
That courage is what makes a great English learner!

page2.readingPassage: Day 30. Graduation Day. Thirty days ago, Bat couldn't speak any English. Today is completely different. He can introduce himself, describe his family, talk about food, give directions, order at a restaurant, make appointments, and discuss his future — all in English! He studied every single day. He never gave up. Now he is going to continue to Book 2. This journey is just beginning. Congratulations, Bat — and congratulations, YOU! 🎓

keyPhrases.mongolian: Би энгийн англи хэлээр ярьж чаддаг

speakingQuestions: 1. Introduce yourself completely — name, age, family, job, hobbies, plans!
2. What was your favorite day in this book? Why?
3. What can you do in English now that you couldn't on Day 1?
4. What are you going to do to keep improving?
5. Tell me your best memory from the last 30 days.
6. What is your advice for someone starting Book 1 today?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: Thank you! I am so happy and proud!

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: The irregular past tense verbs were difficult!

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: I loved Day 20 — ordering food at a restaurant!

rolePlay.speaker: A
rolePlay.text: What are you going to do next?

rolePlay.speaker: B
rolePlay.text: I am going to start Book 2 and keep studying! Study every day, don't fear mistakes, and enjoy it!

page2.speakingTip: Don't worry about mistakes — just keep talking! Every mistake helps you learn faster. Confidence is more important than perfection at this stage.

page3.listeningScript: Teacher: Class, this is our final day — Graduation Day! Bat, how do you feel? Bat: I feel amazing! One month ago I couldn't speak English. Now I can! Teacher: What did you enjoy most? Bat: I loved the listening scripts and role play dialogues — they felt real! Teacher: Sarnai, what are you going to do after this? Sarnai: I am going to start Book 2 immediately! I want to reach B1 and travel to Korea! Teacher: You are both incredible! I am so proud of you! Congratulations to everyone! Everyone: Thank you, teacher! We love English! See you in Book 2! 🎓

listeningQuestions.question: How does Bat feel on graduation day?
What couldn't Bat do one month ago?
What is Sarnai going to do next?
What is Sarnai's goal?
options: reach B1 and travel to Korea

listeningQuestions.question: What does everyone say at the end?
How many days did they study?
What is the most important lesson from 30 days?

grammarPractice: 1. My name _____ Bat. I _____ 16 years old.
5. I _____ swim now! I learned this month.
6. I _____ going to study Book 2 tomorrow!
homework: Writing: Write a letter to yourself — what did you achieve? What are you going to do next?
Vocabulary: Teach someone 10 English words from this book — you are already a teacher!
Speaking: Record yourself in English for 1 minute — listen back and celebrate how far you came!
Next step: 🚀 Start Book 2 (A2 Level) — Speak English in 90 Days continues!
completionSummary: Practiced all 4 skills (reading, writing, speaking, listening)
Can now hold basic English conversations
Earned your A1 certificate — Level 1 complete! 🏆
